description: A perfect stiletto that enhances your feminine touche, this sandal from carlton london blends perfectly with both, western and ethnic wear.Heel: 3"UpperGlossy synthetic leather upper Curved forefoot for ergonomic comfortPadded synthetic leather footbed OutsoleTPU outsole grooved on the curved forefoot and heel patch for grip Sandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry clothDo not store in direct sunlight"
